note: Initial seed — covers roughly the last 30–60 days for breadth. Daily 24-hour runs start tomorrow.

items.title: TouchDesigner build 2025.32820 lands, POPs reshape 3D workflow
items.summary: Latest 2025-cycle build. New POPs (Text, Trace, Triangulate) shift 3D work onto a high-performance node family — a real rethink.

items.title: OpenAI shuts down the Sora app, API to follow in September
items.summary: Standalone Sora product retired April 26. Compute costs and falling usage cited. Sora 2 Pro continues inside aggregator platforms.

items.title: Runway becomes a multi-model hub for AI video
items.summary: Rather than ship a successor, Runway aggregates Kling 3.0, Veo, Seedance 2.0, Sora 2 Pro. Seedance brings keyframe + audio control.

items.title: 2026 TouchDesigner community tools roundup
items.summary: Annual community-tools survey — palettes, utilities, and shared components worth a scan before the next project.
